title: Fix uploading layer blobs to Docker registry
body:
Implement a client to the chunked API, instead of the nonexistent one-shot API (per https://github.com/docker/distribution/commit/2a4deee4413a4027b3024113a2c880e217097754 ).

Adds a FIXME to DELETE the pending upload on failure; the uploads are supposed to time out so this is not immediately critical.

Fixes #64 .
